title: Refurbished Log Boat
description: An unofficial update to Log Boat for 1.21+ giving Boat variation and more
body:
After 1.20.1, original [Log Boat](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/log-boat) doensn't work properly and there is no variation for other type of boats, with this pack i fixed these two issues + 3d model for hotbar and on hand
Credits - [Search](https://modrinth.com/user/Search) - Original Log Boat
Frequently Asked Questions **DOESN'T WORK, WHY?**
Please note that without [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)/[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) this can't work in any way **FOUND A BUG, WHERE CAN I REPORT IT?**
Thanks to be interested in reporting bugs, you can click [here](https://github.com/SplatTracker/RefurbishedLogBoat) to reach the issue tracker
